rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms this is a header row with no associated monetary amounts. gpt-5-mini incorrectly extracted amounts from the subsequent row and misread parts of the description, revealing a misunderstanding of row segmentation.

rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Combined description from both extractors: took 'ad festum' and overall structure from gemini-flash (gpt-5-mini omitted it due to structural error) and 'Bapt.' from gpt-5-mini (gemini-flash misread as 'Bahl.'). Visual verification confirms combined description.

Visual verification confirms pounds 10, shillings 18, and pence 11 with a 1/2 fraction (matching gpt-5-mini's amount extraction). gemini-flash incorrectly read 0 pence. Adopted gemini-flash's description 'Auf' (gpt-5-mini had 'Aug').

rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment for a fourth part of the Sidlington augmentation, amounting to £10 18s 11½d.
